title: verify login page renders correctly
description: Navigate to the /login page and verify that the 'Entrar' button and email and password inputs are present.
steps: Verify that the text 'Plataforma para corretores' is visible
Verify that an input field for email is visible
Verify that an input field for password is visible
Verify that the 'Entrar' button is visible

title: verify generic missing path redirects
description: Navigate to an invalid path and observe the app behavior.
steps: Verify that the application gracefully handles it (e.g. renders a 404 or redirects to home)
